parameters.name: page

schema.description: Page number for pagination. If omitted, uses downstream service default (typically 1).
schema.title: Page

parameters.description: Page number for pagination. If omitted, uses downstream service default (typically 1).

parameters.name: page_size

schema.description: Number of results per page. If omitted, uses downstream service default (typically 50). Maximum: 100.
schema.title: Page Size

parameters.description: Number of results per page. If omitted, uses downstream service default (typically 50). Maximum: 100.

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search term to filter users. Searches in: id (exact match with =id), first_name, last_name, email, profile__organization__name
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search term to filter users. Searches in: id (exact match with =id), first_name, last_name, email, profile__organization__name

parameters.name: ordering

schema.description: Order results by field. Prefix with - for descending order. Supported fields: id, first_name, last_name, email, is_active, role, profile__role_id, last_login, last_login_date
schema.title: Ordering

parameters.description: Order results by field. Prefix with - for descending order. Supported fields: id, first_name, last_name, email, is_active, role, profile__role_id, last_login, last_login_date

parameters.name: user_ids

schema.description: Filter results to only include users with the specified IDs
schema.title: User Ids

parameters.description: Filter results to only include users with the specified IDs
